description: Add comprehensive tests for all security fixes to ensure correctness and prevent regressions.
steps: Add tests for memory endpoint auth in tests/lib/memory-auth.test.ts: mock requireAuth to verify it is called for GET and POST on /api/agent/memory and POST on /api/agent/memory/consolidate.
Add tests for knowledge batch audit in tests/lib/knowledge-batch-audit.test.ts: test that auditKnowledgeContent is called for each entry and that entries with injection patterns are rejected.

Add tests for the CSRF helper in tests/lib/csrf.test.ts: test that validateCsrf allows GET requests, allows POST with matching Origin, rejects POST with mismatched Origin, and handles missing Origin/Referer.

Add tests for input sanitizer enhancements in tests/agent-guard/input-sanitizer.test.ts (append to existing file): test base64-encoded injection detection, dot-splitting bypass detection, and Unicode tag character detection.
Add tests for output validator XSS escaping in tests/agent-guard/output-validator.test.ts (append to existing file): test that
Add tests for rate limiter multi-key in tests/lib/rate-limiter.test.ts (append to existing file): test isRateLimitedMulti checks all keys.
Run npx vitest run to confirm all new and existing tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: All new test files pass with npx vitest run
Tests cover the specific security fix behaviors, not just static assertions
verification: Run `npx vitest run` and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx vitest run --coverage` to check coverage of new security code
